problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
